name: YouTube Kids
description: Google's video streaming service for children with curated content, parental controls, and age-appropriate filtering.

years.notes: Launch wordmark (Feb 2015 – 2017): YouTube TV-screen mark with 'You' (dark grey) + red 'Tube' container with white lettering, above the chunky dark-grey 'KIDS' wordmark. Vectorised from the 711×432 Wikimedia raster (via potrace on per-colour masks). Non-square; fit into the 24×24 viewBox with vertical padding.

Square 'wonky' play-button icon introduced with the 2018-2019 rebrand, used through 2024. Hand-drawn dark grey (#282828) outline, classic YouTube red (#FF0000) body, white triangle, pink/coral (#FF8983) highlight on top. Native artwork is 833×673.7; placed centred in the 24×24 viewBox with 2.296 unit vertical padding.

Q4 2024 rebrand (Oct 22, 2024) aligning with the global YouTube refresh: pinker red (#FF0033), pure black outline, and the pink/coral highlight on top has been dropped. Re-vectorised directly from the 1024×1024 PNG (via potrace on per-colour masks) — the silhouette is smoother and more rounded than the 2019 hand-drawn version, with the play triangle recentred. Sourced from the App Store iTunes Lookup API; filename in the URL ('logo_youtube_kids_2024_q4_color') confirms the millesime.

notes: Parent relationship dropped — meta.json schema enforces single-level parents and 'youtube' already has parent 'google'. The accurate product hierarchy would be youtube-kids → youtube → google; documenting it here since the manifest can only express one level.
